evals.name: recent-topic-default
evals.prompt: Find me the best recent YouTube videos about home espresso machines for beginners.
evals.expected_output: Top ~20 videos from the last 6 months, each with title, channel, subscriber count, view count, duration, upload date, URL, and engagement ratio. Dividers between results, human-readable numbers.

evals.name: year-window-save-note
evals.prompt: I'm researching what's been published on YouTube about the Zig programming language over the past year. Pull together a list with view counts and how big each channel is, and save it as a markdown note in my vault at /Users/khelil/Documents/obsidian/Brain.
evals.expected_output: Results filtered to ~12 months (not the 6-month default), saved as a Markdown file in the vault with clickable links, plus terminal output. Should report scanned/matched counts.

evals.name: engagement-overperformers
evals.prompt: what are people watching on youtube about the apple vision pro lately? i'm especially curious which videos are overperforming relative to how big the channel is.
evals.expected_output: Recent videos with the views-to-subscribers engagement ratio surfaced and interpreted — should call out which videos overperform (ratio > ~1) rather than just listing rows.
